name: Herbed Beef Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 Eye Of Round Roast (5 To 6 Lbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the roast on a sheet of waxed paper.
2. Mix the remaining ingredients, except watercress, in a bowl.
3. Pat the mixture well into the roast.
4. Place the roast on a rack in a shallow baking pan.
5. Do not add water or cover the pan.
6. Roast in a slow oven (325°F) for 2 hours and 15 minutes, or until a meat thermometer registers 140°F for rare.
7. Cover the pan loosely with a sheet of foil and let stand at room temperature until serving time.
8. Place on a platter and garnish with watercress.
9. Serve with Mustard Cream.
Serves: 25 for cocktail buffet.
MUSTARD CREAM
1 cup mayonnaise
1/2 cup prepared mustard
1/2 cup condensed beef consomme'
1/4 cup cream
Combine all ingredients in a bowl. Beat with an electric mixer until well blended. Chill. Makes 2 cups.
